experiments.name: fact-check-accuracy
experiments.description: Test H1-H4: T1 self-consistency catches most false claims, T2 vector search catches 80% of remainder
experiments.setup: Generate 100 synthetic claims (50 true, 50 false), inject into claim DB, run T1+T2+T3 pipeline, measure per-tier precision/recall

experiments.name: confidence-calibration
experiments.description: Validate HCCA: take 50 benchmark-validated claims, apply Hierarchical Confidence Calibration Algorithm, track calibration error over time
experiments.setup: Extract 50 claims from benchmark results with known accuracy, run HCCA calibration, compute |stated - actual| error

experiments.name: gap-vs-fresh-research
experiments.description: KE-first vs fresh web: 20 UU/KU gaps from R&D 2, compare evidence quality and cost
experiments.setup: Take 20 gaps, run pipeliner KE research + fresh web research independently, rate quality 1-5 blind
experiments.verify: KE-first quality >= fresh AND cost < 50% of fresh

experiments.name: tag-clustering
experiments.description: FastEmbed semantic clustering of all tags in claim DB, identify alias groups
experiments.setup: Extract all tags, embed with FastEmbed bge-base, cluster with cosine similarity > 0.85, manual alias review
experiments.verify: >= 5 alias groups found AND no false positives

experiments.name: blog-pipeline-e2e
experiments.description: Run this R&D report through blog-publish.ts pipeline
experiments.setup: Parse RD-DEEP-RESEARCH-2026-05-04.md, run through all 5 stages, score output
experiments.verify: blog_post EXISTS AND word_count 1500-3000 AND coherence_score >= 4

experiments.name: vector-store-benchmark
experiments.description: Benchmark FastEmbed bge-base-en-v1.5 vs current all-MiniLM-L6-v2
experiments.setup: Benchmark encode speed (10K claims), search latency p50/p95/p99, MRR on contradiction detection

experiments.name: cascade-stress-test
experiments.description: Stress test dirty flag cascade: 1000 claims, random mutations, measure cascade time and accuracy
experiments.setup: Generate claim graph with 1000 claims, randomize 10% dirty, measure cascade propagation time and correctness

experiments.name: evidence-cache-unify
experiments.description: Unify evidence caches from all sources, measure coverage improvement

experiments.name: thesis-replication
experiments.description: Replicate thesis validation with different model (MiniMax-M2.7 instead of DeepSeek-V3)
experiments.setup: Run 100 novel math problems with MiniMax-M2.7, compare decomposition vs direct prompting
